name: Creamy Chicken Salad with Nectarines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chicken, nectarines, celery, onion, orange juice, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Lightly combine whipped cream and mayonnaise in a separate small bowl.
3. Gently fold the whipped cream and mayonnaise mixture into the chicken salad just to coat.
4. Spoon the salad onto plates or bowls lined with greens.
5. Sprinkle with walnuts.
